name: Burt Podbere
background: Burt W. Podbere has served as our Chief Financial Officer since September 2015. From February 2011 to September 2015, Mr. Podbere served as Chief Financial Officer of OpenDNS, Inc., a cloud-delivered security company. From September 2010 to February 2011, Mr. Podbere served as Chief Financial Officer of Net Optics, Inc., a network visibility solutions company.
